text:
Wild Luck Alexandrite (, Ki Un Arekisandoraito) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

| colspan="3" align="center" |Brings forth a Wild Luck Alexandrite ring; its owner will get to have once-in-a-lifetime experiences, though you cannot choose whether they're for better or for worse...
|

| colspan="3" align="center" |Help the Sick Bandit Villagers get better.
|
|}

Summary

This card allows the caster to experience random once-in-a-lifetime feelings. The user may experience an indefinite number of these events and cannot control when they will occur. The user is not able to control whether they're for better or for worse so this card should be used with caution.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.075 :: 
所有している者は他の者が決して味わえない貴重な体験をすることが出来る。 幸運か不運かは選ぶことが出来ないが・・・。
|-
![Eng]
|No.075 :: Wild Luck Alexandrite 
The owner can gain valuable experiences, that others can't. Although you can't choose good luck or bad luck.
|}
